title: 8 Soothing Herbal Tinctures for Nursing Home Residents with Dry Lips
description: Mentha x piperita tinctures, also known as peppermint tincture, can help with dry lips due to its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties. The main constituents of peppermint, such as menthol and menthone, have a cooling effect on the skin and help soothe irritation. Peppermint also has natural antibacterial properties that can help combat infections that may be causing the dryness.
